name: 新星 | 流沙
collection: 2021 炙热沙城 II 收藏品
collectionZh: 2021 炙热沙城 II 收藏品
descriptionEn: The Nova's rock-bottom price tag makes it a great ambush weapon for a cash-strapped team. A tan and blue hydrographic pattern has been applied to the stock and receiver. The barrel has been painted dark blue. \"A welcome sight\" would be putting it lightly
descriptionZh: 廉价的新星对于手头紧的玩家来说是一把不错的伏击武器。 这把武器的套筒和握把绘有棕褐色和蓝色的图案。枪管以深蓝色喷涂。 “赏心悦目”这个说法有点儿轻描淡写
